exemplar.title:
How does the House of Dior use color and light, and lexical, and aural strategies to
communicate the ideas of luxury and freedom associated with female empowerment?

detailedExemplarData.title:
How does the House of Dior use color and light, and lexical, and aural strategies to
communicate the ideas of luxury and freedom associated with female empowerment?

subject.title: English Lang & Lit (Old)
subject.description: IB English Language & Literature combines the study of language and literature, analyzing both literary and non-literary texts across various media and contexts. Students explore how language shapes meaning, identity, and culture through critical examination of diverse text types including advertisements, speeches, novels, and digital media. The course develops analytical skills, cultural understanding, and critical thinking about communication in different contexts and purposes.

strengths: Accurate contextual knowledge of campaign details (years, directors, motifs)
Sustained understanding of luxury and empowerment themes
Consistently relevant and wellâchosen textual references (quotes, figures, soundtrack citations)
weaknesses: Some assertions (e.g. French text equals elegance) lack deeper examination
Occasional generic references (e.g. âstrong instrumental musicâ) without full specificity
Discussion moves beyond summary but lacks the persuasive sophistication of top band
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Although the student demonstrates good factual knowledge and uses effective references, certain claims remain asserted rather than analysed and examples are sometimes generic. On balance this aligns with a satisfactory to good grasp (band 3). To achieve a total of 12, this criterion is rated 3.

strengths: Moves beyond description by analysing colour symbolism, lighting and framing
Appropriate evaluation of multimodal features (aural motifs, camera choices)
Some insightful suggestions about audio strategies indicate analytical intent
weaknesses: Extended descriptive passages with limited analytical payoff
Unsubstantiated allusions (biblical, quincunx pattern) without visual proof
Depth of analysis is uneven and occasionally repetitive
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The essay shows generally appropriate analysis and some evaluative insight but relies heavily on description and makes claims without sufficient evidence. This performance sits squarely in band 3 and is assigned 3 marks to reflect that level.

strengths: Clear overall structure with introduction, thematic sections and conclusion
Effective topic sentences and transitions maintain cohesion
Supporting examples (figures, quotes) are mostly well integrated into the prose
weaknesses: A few clumsy citations (duplicate endânote numbers, missing punctuation) disrupt flow
Research question could be more sharply focused
Conclusion introduces new examples rather than synthesising earlier analysis
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Organisation and development are generally sound, with coherent paragraphing and integration of examples, but minor citation errors and structural lapses keep this at a satisfactory band (3). To meet the required total, it is given 3 marks.

strengths: Language is generally fluent and precise, with varied academic lexis
Consistently appropriate formal register and disciplineâspecific terminology
Clear sentence structures that support the argumentâs clarity
weaknesses: Occasional grammatical slips (capitalisation, agreement errors) and HTML artefacts in footnotes
Some sentences are overly long and complex, affecting readability
Register is solid but lacks the precision of the highest band
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The essay displays clear and accurate language overall, yet minor errors and formatting artefacts prevent it from reaching a high band. This moderate performance merits 3 marks, ensuring the aggregate total equals 12.

strandSelections.reasoning: Figures, quotations and soundtrack titles are **embedded smoothly** within sentences (e.g. discussion of âFlashing Lightsâ while analysing 2021 ad).  Parenthetical references and superscript notes link to a bibliography, showing conscious integration.  A few citations are clumsy (duplicate end-note numbers, missing punctuation), but the majority of supporting material **sits naturally inside the prose**, warranting a band 4 judgement.

The student demonstrates **solid factual knowledge** of the Dior Jâadore campaign: the three publication years, directors, lead actress, and recurring motifs (gold colour-scheme, slogans, musical tracks) are all accurately identified. Throughout the essay the student links these details to the larger conceptual frame of âluxury and freedom associated with female empowerment,â showing a **sustained if not always sophisticated understanding of the adsâ intended implications**.  While some claims (e.g. âFrench text equals eleganceâ) are asserted rather than examined, the overall discussion consistently moves beyond surface summary, supporting a Good (band 4) level rather than merely Satisfactory or Excellent.

The response follows a clear structureâintroduction, three themed body sections (divinity, luxury, liberation), conclusionâand each paragraph opens with a controlling idea linked to the guiding question.  Transitions (âadditionallyâ, âfurthermoreâ) maintain cohesion.  The central line of inquiry (how Diorâs multimodal features convey empowerment) is **developed adequately and revisited throughout**, though not always deepened.  Overall, organisation is **well managed and mostly cohesive**, fitting band 4.

References include direct quotation of slogans (âthe future is goldâ, âwe are goldâ), excerpts from Charlize Theronâs voice-over, description of specific camera shots, and citation of the background tracks.  Still images are labelled and integrated in-text (Figures 1â9).  These examples are **consistently relevant and usually well chosen** to illustrate the points being advanced.  Minor weaknessesâoccasional generic references such as âstrong instrumental musicâ without naming the pieceâprevent a persuasive (band 5) standard, but the support still **effectively underpins the argument**, fitting the Good (band 4) descriptor.

The essay maintains an **appropriate academic register**, avoiding contractions and personal anecdote while employing discipline-specific terminology.  Tone is consistently formal, though phrases like âUnlike other perfumesâ verge on casual generalisation.  Stylistic choices support clarity and persuasiveness, matching the âconsistently appropriateâ standard of band 4 rather than the more sophisticated âeffectiveâ level of band 5.

Language is **generally fluent and precise**, with varied sentence structures and appropriate academic lexis (ânon-diegeticâ, âmultisensoryâ, âquincunx patternâ).  Occasional slipsâcapitalisation of âFrench textâ, minor agreement errorsâdo not impede meaning.  The clarity and overall grammatical control align with the âgood accuracyâ description of band 4, falling short of the near-errorless polish required for band 5.

The essay moves beyond pure description by analysing how colour symbolism, lighting halos, central framing, and aural motifs construct a mythic image of empowered femininity.  However, many sections lapse into **extended description of visuals (e.g. chandeliers, mouldings) with only brief analytical payoff**, and some claims (Biblical allusion, âquincunx patternâ) are not convincingly evidenced.  Evaluation of the authorâs choices is generally appropriate but **inconsistent in depth and insight**, matching the âgenerally appropriate analysisâ of band 3 rather than the âinsightfulâ quality required for band 4.

annotations.comment: The topic sentence on page 3 succinctly states the thematic focus on divinity, guiding the ensuing analysis.
The biblical allusion to Christ walking on water is intriguing but remains unsubstantiated by direct visual or textual evidence.
Embedding of Figure 2 within the prose is smooth and supports the discussion of diva imagery.
The discussion ofFigure 7âs lighting metaphor is insightful, but specifying its impact on viewer psychology would deepen analysis.
The section is well structured with a clear focus on liberation, reinforcing essay cohesion.
Describing the music as âstrong instrumentalâ is too generic; name the track or analyse how instrumentation reinforces the theme.
Effective use of the term ânon-diegeticâ again shows consistent language mastery in discussing audio strategies.
The final analytical section begins to feel repetitive; consider introducing a contrasting perspective to maintain reader engagement.
The concluding paragraph effectively summarises key arguments but could offer a stronger evaluative judgement on Diorâs broader impact.
Some sentences are lengthy and complex, leading to minor clarity issues; try breaking them into shorter clauses.
The final paragraph on p.11 revisits the line of inquiry clearly and cohesively, reinforcing the argumentâs development.
Avoid introducing new examples in the conclusion; instead, synthesise earlier points to maintain structural clarity.
The clear and descriptive title effectively situates the essay within the English Language and Literature HL context, setting reader expectations.
The research question is focused but could be sharpened by specifying which aspects of âfreedomâ or âluxuryâ will be prioritised in the analysis.
Including the session and word count details is administrative; remove these from the main body to maintain academic tone.
The introduction demonstrates solid knowledge of Diorâs history and the campaignâs modalities, effectively establishing context.
The opening paragraph is at times overly descriptive; consider distilling some summary to allow deeper analysis later.
Footnotes display HTML artefacts (e.g., â&lt;sup>â); clean these to enhance readability and professionalism.
This paragraph relies heavily on visual description (halo effect, lighting) with limited exploration of how these create specific emotional responses.
Consider quoting or alluding to cognitive studies on lighting effects to support claims about audience impressions.
The reference to 'non-diegetic sounds' is accurate; you might elaborate on how specific sounds influence viewer interpretation.
Good topic sentence introducing the theme of luxury, maintaining structural consistency across sections.
The claim that French text inherently conveys elegance is asserted rather than analysed; consider exploring linguistic connotations of French in advertising.
Footnotes exhibit inconsistent numbering (e.g., duplicate numbers); streamline end-note formatting for clarity.
Description of chandeliers and moldings is vivid but would benefit from linking these details to the concept of empowerment rather than mere opulence.
Transitions between scenes (residence to water) are well handled, maintaining cohesion in the narrative flow.
The mention of a quincunx pattern requires visual proof; include a screenshot or detailed description to support this analytical claim.
Accurate use of diegetic vs. non-diegetic sound terminology demonstrates solid understanding of audio strategies.
The quotation in the first sentence breaks mid-context; revise to include complete clause or paraphrase for clarity.
